mapper.sql:
uc.id as uc_id, uc.user_id, uc.conversation_id, uc.conversation_type, uc.unread_count, uc.last_read_seq, uc.is_top, uc.is_mute, uc.show_nickname, uc.status as uc_status, uc.create_time as uc_create_time, uc.update_time as uc_update_time,
c.id as c_id, c.conversation_type as c_conversation_type, c.conversation_key, c.conversation_name, c.conversation_avatar, c.last_message_id, c.last_message_time, c.last_message_content, c.last_message_sender, c.status as c_status, c.create_time as c_create_time, c.update_time as c_update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM im_user_conversation uc INNER JOIN im_conversation c ON uc.conversation_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.conversation_id = #{conversationId} AND uc.status = 1 AND c.status = 1

SELECT FROM im_user_conversation uc INNER JOIN im_conversation c ON uc.conversation_id = c.id WHERE uc.user_id = #{userId} AND uc.is_top = 1 AND uc.status = 1 AND c.status = 1 ORDER BY c.last_message_time DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
